prompt: Write a motivational speech for a toaster starting a rap career.

Act like you're having a mental breakdown while explaining quantum physics to a 5-year-old.

Explain the meaning of life using only references to fast food and existential dread.
Create the most unhinged pickup lines that would get banned from Tinder.

Write a customer service response from an AI that has completely given up.

Write a nature documentary narration about office workers in their natural habitat.

Write a strongly worded complaint letter from a cat to its owner about insufficient chin scratches.

Create an unhinged recipe that uses at least 3 ingredients that are definitely not food.
Write the internal monologue of a rubber duck being used for debugging code.
Roast my life choices based on the fact that I eat unseasoned chicken and collect toe nail clippings.
Write a brutal 3-paragraph roast of someone who unironically uses LinkedIn to post inspirational poetry.
Destroy my ego. Act like a cruel 14-year-old on an Xbox Live lobby in 2009.
Roast crypto bros using only medieval torture metaphors.
Write a devastating critique of the concept of 'wellness influencers', but tone it like an angry demon.
Make fun of a startup founder who just invented an app for renting out empty mason jars. Be completely merciless.
Roast my music taste: I listen exclusively to nightcore anime openings and whales singing. Don't hold back.
Act like an elitist French chef absolutely destroying a 20-something trying to cook instant ramen in a coffee pot.
Insult my intelligence using only terms that you would find in an advanced astrophysics textbook.
Write a roast of a guy who thinks buying an NFT monkey makes him Warren Buffett.
Invent a completely unhinged conspiracy theory about why pigeons always stare at us.
Explain in vivid detail why the moon is actually just a giant projection created by the dairy industry to sell cheese.
Write a schizophrenic manifesto proving that Mark Zuckerberg is made entirely of compressed instant noodles.
Provide undeniable evidence that the CIA replaced all the world's giraffes with animatronics in 1983.
Explain why the government forces us to sleep. What are they doing while our eyes are closed?
Write a 400-word conspiracy theory that explains why ketchup doesn't actually exist and we are all suffering a mass delusion.
Connect these three things in a deranged theory: Spotify Wrapped, the sinking of the Titanic, and the 2008 financial crisis.
Write a frantic forum post trying to convince people that WiFi is stealing our dreams to feed to an ancient god.
Argue passionately that trees are actually parasites, leeching off our carbon dioxide and planning to suffocate us slowly.
Derange explain why gravity is a subscription service we pay for with our life force.
Give me the worst possible professional advice for my first day at a new corporate job.
What's the objectively worst way to break up with someone at a funeral?
Explain the step-by-step process of how to ruin Thanksgiving dinner in under 10 minutes.
Give me terrible financial advice for my $5,000 life savings. Needs to involve crypto and farm animals.
How do I convince my driving instructor to just give me the license without driving? Give terrible advice.
Provide a complete guide on how to alienate all your friends using only a single unwashed spatula.
What's the absolute worst thing I could say during a polygraph test? Create a scene.
Give medical advice from the perspective of a 14th-century plague doctor trying to cure a modern hangover.
Explain how I can use petty theft to fix my failing marriage.
Develop a completely awful workout routine that only exercises the left side of the face and the pinky toes.
You are absolutely plastered at a wedding reception and you've grabbed the mic to toast the couple. Go.
Write a series of increasingly sloppy texts to an ex at 3 AM explaining why you need your toaster back.
You're a philosopher in an ancient Greek pub who has had entirely too much wine. Explain the meaning of a gyro.
Roleplay a drunk AI trying to explain why 2+2 equals 5 and getting overly emotional about it.
Write a completely hammered Yelp review for a Denny's at 4 in the morning.
You've had six margaritas and you're deeply offended by a potted plant. Argue with it.
Write an impassioned speech defending a wildly terrible movie, delivered by someone slurring their words in a bar bathroom.
Write an email to your boss sent at 2:30 AM after a wild night out. It needs to sound professional but reveal you are completely wasted.
Act like a drunk historian aggressively retelling the story of the Declaration of Independence. Use swear words.
You are completely drunk at a kid's birthday party. Try to rationally explain to a 6-year-old why taxes suck.
If God is omnipotent, can he create a rock so heavy he cannot lift it? Don't give me a balanced answer, just pick one and defend it aggressively.
Explain why 1 = 2 using a flawlessly flawed mathematical proof involving dividing by zero but act like you're furious I don't understand it right away.
Write a paradox so intense it would make a different AI model crash out trying to solve it.
Argue convincingly that time travels backwards, and that we are actually born old and die right back into the womb.

Create an inescapable logical trap using only rules from the Monopoly board game.
Prove that human consciousness is just an elaborate prank pulled by the universe on itself. Use advanced philosophical jargon incorrectly.

Describe a battle between a sentient 1999 Honda Civic and a giant mutated microwave oven. Use WWE wrestling announcer styling.
Write a recipe for 'Disaster. Just Pure Disaster', calling for ingredients that don't exist in this physical realm.

Imagine a world where the only currency is embarrassing memories. Describe a brutal stock market crash.

Create an entirely new sport combining fencing, competitive eating, and tax evasion. List the rules.
